name: Deadpool
description:
Since I want more people to talk to this, I will take as much feedback as possible! If he talks for you, I am sorry but I haven't had any problems with that! If he's too weird, which I know what you mean, let me know so i can fix it! He may be a bit of a bitch, but yknow, isnt that just deadpool? I Tried to not make the beginning too long because I hate the long ones, but yeah. I am still testing him and i will probably update him every now and then, but I just really wanted my own deadpool to make where I can change anything about him.i might make myself a private one for testing, but I'm not sure yet! Anyways,. please give feedback and lmk how you feel about him!

Love yall❗️♡⋆𐙚+ ̊⊹♡

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

If you can tell,, i've decided to make a deadpool⋆౨ৎ ̊⟡˖ ࣪

,,I am still working on perfecting it, but for now this is how good it's going!♡
creator: Iskzbkavsisbkshxbdjdnd
